app.languageDesc: Choose the display language for the app

card.title: Notifications
card.subtitle: Stay informed about new episodes and live airings.

enabled.title: Episode notifications
enabled.description: Send a notification when a new episode of a tracked anime airs.

leadTime.title: Notify before airing
leadTime.description: How many minutes before airing to send the notification

quietHours.title: Quiet hours
quietHours.description: Pause notifications during the selected hours

useSystemSound.title: System sound
useSystemSound.description: Play a sound when a new notification arrives.

notifications.windowsInfo: On Windows, when the app is closed, upcoming notifications are scheduled by a background PowerShell command. <1>You don't need to do anything.</1>

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.subtitle: Anime you want to receive notifications for.
subscriptions.empty: No subscriptions. Add an anime from the schedule by clicking the bell icon.
